title: RTP Zone
description: Randomly teleport all players inside a specific region to the same location
body:
INFORMATION:

RTPZone is a powerful and feature-rich Minecraft plugin that creates automated Random Teleport (RTP) zones using WorldGuard regions. Players within designated zones are automatically teleported using BetterRTP's advanced teleportation system after configurable cooldown periods. This plugin is perfect for PvP servers, minigames, or any server wanting to create dynamic areas where players are periodically relocated. With support for multiple zones, customizable timers, reset periods, and comprehensive PlaceholderAPI integration, RTPZone offers unparalleled flexibility for server administrators looking to enhance player experience through automated teleportation mechanics.

FEATURES:

  1. Multi-zone support with unlimited configurable RTP regions.
  2. WorldGuard integration for persistent region detection.
  3. BetterRTP integration for advanced teleportation mechanics.
  4. Independent cooldown timers for each zone.
  5. Configurable reset periods between teleport cycles.
  6. PlaceholderAPI support for scoreboards and holograms.
  7. Rich messaging system with customizable chat and title notifications.
  8. Warning system with countdown alerts (30s, 10s, 5s, etc.).
  9. Force teleport commands for administrative control.
  10. Performance optimized for large servers with multiple regions.
  11. Comprehensive configuration with per-region settings.
  12. And much more!

OVERVIEW:

REQUIREMENTS:

  • Server: Paper/Spigot 1.19+ with Java 17+
  • Required: WorldEdit 7.2+, WorldGuard 7.0+, BetterRTP 3.6+
  • Optional: PlaceholderAPI 2.11+ (for advanced integrations)

PLACEHOLDERS:

RTPZone provides comprehensive PlaceholderAPI support:

  • %rtpzone_<region>_cooldown% - Shows countdown timer or "Resetting" status
  • Configurable time formats (seconds or mm:ss)
  • Perfect for scoreboards, holograms, and chat formatting

SUPPORT:

Need help with setup or have questions? Join our Discord server for comprehensive support, updates, and community discussions.
